scripts.eval: cd evals && DEEPEVAL_TELEMETRY_OPT_OUT=YES uv run deepeval test run test_articles.py
scripts.eval:quick: cd evals && DEEPEVAL_TELEMETRY_OPT_OUT=YES uv run python run_eval.py --articles 1 2 3
scripts.eval:agent: cd evals && DEEPEVAL_TELEMETRY_OPT_OUT=YES uv run deepeval test run test_agent.py
scripts.eval:judge: cd evals && DEEPEVAL_TELEMETRY_OPT_OUT=YES uv run deepeval test run test_llm_judge.py
scripts.eval:synthesize: cd evals && DEEPEVAL_TELEMETRY_OPT_OUT=YES uv run python synthesize.py
scripts.eval:synthetic: cd evals && DEEPEVAL_TELEMETRY_OPT_OUT=YES uv run deepeval test run test_synthetic.py
scripts.eval:redteam: cd evals && DEEPEVAL_TELEMETRY_OPT_OUT=YES uv run python -m redteam quick
scripts.eval:redteam:full: cd evals && DEEPEVAL_TELEMETRY_OPT_OUT=YES uv run python -m redteam full
scripts.eval:redteam:test: cd evals && DEEPEVAL_TELEMETRY_OPT_OUT=YES uv run deepeval test run test_redteam.py
scripts.eval:redteam:article: cd evals && DEEPEVAL_TELEMETRY_OPT_OUT=YES uv run deepeval test run test_redteam_article.py
scripts.eval:all: cd evals && DEEPEVAL_TELEMETRY_OPT_OUT=YES uv run deepeval test run test_articles.py test_agent.py test_llm_judge.py test_synthetic.py
scripts.eval:rag:populate: cd evals && uv run python populate_embeddings.py
scripts.eval:rag:populate:dry: cd evals && uv run python populate_embeddings.py --dry-run
scripts.eval:rag:synthesize: cd evals && DEEPEVAL_TELEMETRY_OPT_OUT=YES uv run python synthesize_rag.py
scripts.eval:rag:synthesize:quick: cd evals && DEEPEVAL_TELEMETRY_OPT_OUT=YES uv run python synthesize_rag.py --category rag --goldens-per-lesson 2
scripts.eval:rag:triad: cd evals && DEEPEVAL_TELEMETRY_OPT_OUT=YES uv run deepeval test run test_rag_triad.py
scripts.eval:rag:extended: cd evals && DEEPEVAL_TELEMETRY_OPT_OUT=YES uv run deepeval test run test_rag_extended.py
scripts.eval:rag:multiturn: cd evals && DEEPEVAL_TELEMETRY_OPT_OUT=YES uv run deepeval test run test_rag_multiturn.py
scripts.eval:rag:custom: cd evals && DEEPEVAL_TELEMETRY_OPT_OUT=YES uv run deepeval test run test_rag_custom.py
scripts.eval:rag:hyperparams: cd evals && DEEPEVAL_TELEMETRY_OPT_OUT=YES uv run python test_rag_hyperparams.py
scripts.eval:rag:all: cd evals && DEEPEVAL_TELEMETRY_OPT_OUT=YES uv run deepeval test run test_rag_triad.py test_rag_extended.py test_rag_multiturn.py test_rag_custom.py
scripts.generate: cd backend && uv run python -m graph.cli
scripts.generate:dry: cd backend && uv run python -m graph.cli --dry-run
scripts.generate:missing: cd backend && uv run python -m graph.cli --list-missing
scripts.generate:batch: cd backend && uv run python -m graph.cli --batch
scripts.generate:test: cd backend && uv run pytest tests/ -v
